sections.heading: What is a Calories Burned Calculator?
sections.content:
A Calories Burned Calculator (also called Activity Calories Burned Calculator or Workout Calories Burned Calculator) estimates how many calories your body uses during physical activity. It helps with:

- Weight loss tracking
- Fitness planning
- Daily activity estimation
- Exercise comparison (running, walking, cycling, swimming, yoga, HIIT)

sections.heading: How to Calculate Calories Burned?
sections.content:
The calculator uses the formula:

Calories Burned = MET × Weight (kg) × Duration (hours)

- MET = Intensity of activity
- Weight = Body weight in kg or lbs
- Duration = Time spent exercising

subSections.heading: Example Calculation
subSections.content:
Running at 8 km/h (MET 8.3) for 30 minutes at 70 kg weight:

8.3 × 70 × 0.5 = ~290 calories burned

sections.heading: Global Use and Local Relevance
sections.content: This calculator works worldwide (USA, UK, Canada, Australia, India, Pakistan, Europe). Trainers and fitness apps use it for weight loss programs, gym workouts, and personalized health plans.

faq.q: How to calculate calories burned during exercise?
faq.a: Use the formula: MET × Weight (kg) × Duration (hours) or simply enter your details into our calculator.

faq.q: What is the most accurate calorie burn calculator?
faq.a: Accurate calculators adjust for weight, age, gender, BMI, and heart rate—like ours.

faq.q: How many calories are burned by running, walking, cycling, or swimming?
How many calories are burned in 30 minutes of exercise?
Can I calculate daily calories burned?
faq.a: Yes. Our Daily Calories Burned Calculator estimates energy expenditure across all activities.
Yes, heavier individuals burn more calories per activity compared to lighter individuals.
